kick.description: Removes a member from the group.

promote.description: Makes a member a group administrator.

edbot-ai.description: Asks the AI assistant a question using Puter.js (GPT-4o).

auto-reply.description: Toggles AI auto-reply for private chats and handles authentication.

viewonce.description: Reveals and re-sends view-once media messages.

sticker.description: Converts image or video to a WhatsApp sticker.

weather.description: Checks the current weather for a specific city.

update.description: Automatically increments the bot version and reloads the menu.
